zh.St. Harmon, Gwrtheyrnion, Radnorshire, W: 威爾士拉德諾斯爾聖 漢蒙
zh.lifeSummary: 當Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerth於大約1046年出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾聖 漢蒙時，他的父親Llewelyn ap Idnerth28歲，母親Efa Verch Bleddyn23歲。他和Idnerth至少有2個兒子。

zh-hans.St. Harmon, Gwrtheyrnion, Radnorshire, W: 威尔士拉德諾斯爾聖 漢蒙

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

en.lifeSummary: When Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerth was born about 1046, in St Harmon, Radnorshire, Wales, his father, Llewelyn ap Idnerth, was 28 and his mother, Efa Verch Bleddyn, was 23. He had at least 2 sons with Idnerth.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerth est né environ 1046, à St Harmon, Radnorshire, Galles, son père, Llewelyn ap Idnerth, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Efa Verch Bleddyn, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Idnerth.

de.lifeSummary: Als Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerth um 1046 in St Harmon, Radnorshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewelyn ap Idnerth 28 und seine Mutter Efa Verch Bleddyn 23. Er hatte mit Idnerth mindestens 2 Söhne.

ht.Flintshire, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerth è nato il circa 1046 nel St Harmon, Radnorshire, Galles, il suo padre, Llewelyn ap Idnerth, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Efa Verch Bleddyn, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Idnerth.

ja.lifeSummary: Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerthが約1046年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアスト ハーモンで生まれた時，父Llewelyn ap Idnerthは28歳，母Efa Verch Bleddynは23歳であった。彼はIdnerthとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerth(이)가 대략 1046년 웨일스 라드노르실르 스트 하몬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewelyn ap Idnerth(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa Verch Bleddyn(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Idnerth(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

mg.Flintshire, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerth nasceu aproximadamente 1046, em St Harmon, Radnorshire, Gales, seu pai, Llewelyn ap Idnerth, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Efa Verch Bleddyn, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Idnerth.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerth родился около 1046 г. в местности ст хармон, радноршир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Llewelyn ap Idnerth было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Efa Verch Bleddyn, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Idnerth.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Iorwerth 'Llwyd' ap Idnerth nació aproximadamente 1046, en St Harmon, Radnorshire, Gales, su papá, Llewelyn ap Idnerth, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Efa Verch Bleddyn, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Idnerth.
